# Daily Report — 2026-07-17

## Task Completed
Added `update_on_call_rotation` tool (PATCH cmn_rota/{sys_id}).

Accepts rotation by sys_id or exact name via the existing `_resolve_on_call_rotation_sys_id` helper.
Optional fields: name, group, active, description, manager, schedule, escalation, rotation_type.
Empty-body guard returns a clear error when no fields are provided.
404 guard returns a clear error when the record is not found.
Active serialised as "true"/"false" string per ServiceNow convention.
Registered in system_administrator and full packages in tool_packages.yaml.
Registered in __init__.py, tool_utils.py (import + tool dict entry).
